title: Automatically link columns between imported Excel sheets
excerpt:
Hello, 
My team and I got a few Excel sheets that we want to import into monday.com; some of each sheet’s columns contain information from the other sheets (i.e. they are “linked columns”), but monday doesn’t seem to sup…

posts.author: Lucia1 (Lucia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

My team and I got a few Excel sheets that we want to import into monday.com; some of each sheet’s columns contain information from the other sheets (i.e. they are “linked columns”), but monday doesn’t seem to support this feature without having to manually link each item one by one (which due to the amount of items included in every sheet is totaly unfeasible), so I was wondering if I could get any input on how to achieve this via the monday API or in any other way.

Regards,

Lucía

posts.author: efinucane (Edward Finucane)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you ever get a satisfactory answer to this as I would like do something similar?

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @efinucane - We have done this successfully with Integromat. Are you familiar with it? (It’s basically Zapier’s big brother, lol)
